zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Leveson於1530年8月10日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親James Leveson29歲，母親Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson45歲。她於1555年與William Fowkes在英國斯塔福爾布霍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1572年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Leveson于1530年8月10日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲James Leveson29岁，母亲Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson45岁。她于1555年与William Fowkes在英国斯塔福爾布霍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1572年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Leveson was born on 10 August 1530, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Leveson, was 29 and her mother, Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson, was 45. She married William Fowkes in 1555, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1572, in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Leveson est née le 10 août 1530, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Leveson, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé William Fowkes en 1555, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1572, à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Leveson am 10. August 1530 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Leveson 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson 45. Sie hat 1555 in Brewood, Staffordshire, England William Fowkes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1572 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Leveson è nata il il 10 agosto 1530 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Leveson, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato William Fowkes nel 1555, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1572, nel Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Levesonが1530年8月10日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父James Levesonは29歳，母Lady Alice Wrottesley Leversonは45歳であった。1555年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドでWilliam Fowkesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1572年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Leveson(이)가 1530년 8월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Leveson(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1555년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 William Fowkes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Leveson nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1530, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Leveson, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fowkes em 1555, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1572, em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Leveson родилась 10 августа 1530 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Leveson было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fowkes в 1555 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1572 г. в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Leveson nació el 10 de agosto de 1530, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Leveson, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Wrottesley Leverson, tenía 45 años. Se casó con William Fowkes en 1555, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1572, en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
